title: Accounting, BS
markdown_content:
# Accounting, BS

**School:** School of Business

**Total credits:** 120

**Format:** Online or campus

The Accounting, BS program requires business core, accounting major courses, general education, and electives. Students should confirm transfer applicability with advising.

## Core courses

- [ACC 210 - Financial Accounting](#)
- [ACC 315 - Cost and Managerial Accounting](#)
- [ACC 410 - Auditing Concepts](#)
- [BUS 220 - Business Law and Ethics](#)
- [BUS 310 - Business Analytics](#)

title: Business Administration, BS

title: Business Administration, MBA
markdown_content:
# Business Administration, MBA

**School:** School of Business

**Total credits:** 36

**Format:** Online

The MBA program includes graduate business core courses and a capstone. Students normally take one course per accelerated graduate term unless advising approves a different load.

## Core courses

- [BUS 520 - Strategic Management](#)
- [BUS 540 - Managerial Finance](#)
- [BUS 560 - Organizational Leadership](#)
- [MKT 610 - Marketing Strategy](#)
- [BUS 650 - Analytics for Executives](#)
- [BUS 690 - MBA Capstone](#)

title: Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS
markdown_content:
# Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS

**School:** School of Health and Human Services

**Total credits:** 60

**Format:** Online with synchronous and field-experience requirements

The Clinical Mental Health Counseling, MS program follows a structured sequence. Students complete foundational counseling courses before practicum and internship courses.

## Core courses

- [CMHC 500 - Professional Counseling Orientation](#)
- [CMHC 520 - Counseling Theories](#)
- [CMHC 540 - Assessment and Treatment Planning](#)
- [CMHC 590 - Counseling Practicum](#)
- [CMHC 690 - Counseling Internship](#)

## Licensure disclosure

Educational requirements for counseling licensure vary by state. Students must review the state authorization and licensure disclosure page for their intended state.
school: School of Health and Human Services
